findings.title: findings
findings.description: Focused, high-value analysis of what the implicated code and metadata reveal about how the error could occur, citing specific classes/methods, flow elements, or fields.

likelyCause.title: likelyCause
likelyCause.description: The single most likely cause the grounding context supports, or a plain statement of what is missing if the context is insufficient.

suggestedNextItems.title: suggestedNextItems
suggestedNextItems.description: Additional type:identifier tokens (apex:/flow:/field:/symboltable:) referenced by the context but not included, worth investigating next. Empty when the context is sufficient.
